social.text:
Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, together with Defense Minister Israel Katz visited the IDF 96th Division on the eastern border.

The Prime Minister and the Minister of Defense visited one of the ‘water-line outposts’, which have been upgraded to add a line of defense along the

social.name: Emmanuel Macron
social.text:
The EWC will be held in Paris!

It is a historic first and an honor for us. Thank you to Saudi Arabia for their trust. We are ready to host the Esports World Cup 2026. Very proud to welcome the world once again.

social.name: Recep Erdogan
social.text:
Bu hareket bir kişiye, bir gruba çıkar sağlama hareketi değildir.
 
Bu hareket kişisel rant peşinde koşan bir hareket değildir.
 
Bu hareket köksüz bir hareket değildir, saman alevi gibi parlayıp sönecek bir hareket hiç değildir.
 
Bu hareket ta en başından itibaren millet davası

social.name: Recep Erdogan
social.text:
15 Temmuz gecesi meydanlarda kurduğumuz Cumhur İttifakı’yla inşallah yeni başarılara, yeni zaferlere imza atacağız.

En büyük eserlerimizden biri olarak gördüğümüz Terörsüz Türkiye sürecimizi ortak akılla, sağduyuyla menziline ulaştırmakta kararlıyız.

social.name: Israeli PM Office
social.text:
Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu:
“Israel has every right to prevent provocative flotillas of Hamas terrorist supporters from entering our territorial waters and reaching Gaza.

However, the way that Minister Ben Gvir dealt with the flotilla activists is not in line with Israel’

social.name: Keir Starmer
social.text:
We’ve just extended the fuel duty cut for the rest of the year.

This will support millions of drivers and families across the country.

My Labour government is focused on what matters to you: cutting the cost of living.

Video

social.name: Keir Starmer
social.text:
RT by @Keir_Starmer: Good news: inflation has fallen today.

Our action to reduce energy bills - with the price cap dropping by £117 - means inflation is now lower.

There’s more to do - this government is delivering for Britain.

social.text:
Solo hay algo peor a que te maten un hijo: que maten a tu hijo y no puedas enterrarle. 

“Hasta encontrarte”, estreno hoy en Madrid del documental dirigido por Daniel Posada.

social.text:

social.text:
